title: Stock Market today: Why did Sensex and Nifty surge? Explained
description: The Indian stock market witnessed significant gains as Sensex and Nifty surged on Thursday. The rally was primarily driven by US President Donald Trump’s statement assuring oil tanker escort in the Strait of Hormuz, easing global crude supply fears.
